entry.title: Machine Learning Formulas You Actually Need (With Examples) | ml0x.com
entry.summary: A practical guide to the ML formulas that matter most in real projects — from gradient descent to attention mechanisms, with worked examples.

entry.title: CNN vs RNN vs Transformer: When to Use Which | ml0x.com
entry.summary: A practical guide to choosing between CNN, RNN, and Transformer architectures. Comparison of strengths, use cases, performance, and training requirements.
